description.value:
A well-forged steel breastplate with an unusual surface brightness that seems to shift slightly depending on who's looking at it. The previous owner was described as 'relentlessly optimistic.'

Curse. While attuned, the wearer has advantage on Persuasion checks but disadvantage on Insight checks. More critically, they cannot benefit from the Help action from allies - the armour insists they don't need it.

unidentified.description: A polished steel breastplate. AC 14. Heavier than you expected for its size.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: A polished steel breastplate. AC 14. Fine craft.
cursedMeta.trueNature: Attunement: advantage on Persuasion, disadvantage on Insight, cannot benefit from ally Help action.

curse.name: Borrowed Confidence
curse.description: While attuned the wearer has advantage on Persuasion checks, disadvantage on Insight checks, and cannot benefit from the Help action from allies.

hints: Allies report the wearer brushing off advice that should matter.

escalation.effect: Overconfidence after a clean exchange; dismissive remarks in the adrenaline spike.
